# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: PASS

**Test:** UI Login: password field masked by default
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:21.560Z
**OWASP Category:** API2:2023 - Broken Authentication

## Description

Password input is masked by default (type="password").
